problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus may resolve What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
